title: Manga Free Full Color Evangelion manga Sadamoto
display_title: Manga Free Full Color Evangelion manga Sadamoto
wikitext:
[]: [Manga] Free Full Color Evangelion manga (Sadamoto)             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Mar 21, 2014 1:36 pm Kadokawa's new site, Comic Walker, which opened today in Japan is offering this. News here: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2935.html Direct link to the page: http://comic-walker.com/contents/detail/KDCW_CW01000003010000_68/ No idea if they're redoing the full series in this style or just volume 1 for fun. Looks like it closes after page 20-something.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Mar 21, 2014 3:14 pm Eva manga in COLOR! Holy crap! Nice find

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Mar 21, 2014 4:06 pm It doesn't work for me!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Mar 21, 2014 5:24 pm I like the very spare colouring style - for me it's worthwhile without changing the atmosphere. Of course, the first few pages were in colour already, so not a huge amount of work has been shown yet.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFourthReplicant » Fri Mar 21, 2014 9:36 pm Now you, yes YOU, can experience Evangelion while listening to New Angels of Promise ! Woot!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 21, 2014 11:20 pm ElMariachi wrote: It doesn't work for me!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 22, 2014 1:08 am Bah, opening it again doesn't work for me a second time.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Sat Mar 22, 2014 4:38 am Doesn't work in the browser but works in the Android version (I installed their software and it downloaded the chapter). It's really slow but it works.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 22, 2014 4:44 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Anyone able to screenshot/save that business and put it up on something reliable like imgur?

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Sat Mar 22, 2014 10:47 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Bah, opening it again doesn't work for me a second time.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 22, 2014 1:17 pm It tells me (in Japanese) that the server "is updating". I've tried a different browser, so it's not that it's dropped a cookie (I looked anyway) to prevent revisiting.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sat Mar 22, 2014 2:09 pm pwhodges wrote: It tells me (in Japanese) that the server "is updating".

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue Mar 25, 2014 9:34 am So i guess i'm the only person here who wasn't too hot on the colouring. I don't know, for me it feels like it seriously lacked... something. It feels like the intensity and composition of the colors wasn't handled too well or something, and it gave it a somewhat plain feel to it. Maybe it's just me though. Was Sadamoto the one who did the colouring, or someone else?

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Mar 25, 2014 11:00 am Just checked myself, seems like the page is running normally again..

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Mar 25, 2014 12:35 pm For your convenience, I've made a gallery of the images: http://imgur.com/a/sXpin

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Mar 25, 2014 12:40 pm Thank YOU !

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Mar 25, 2014 1:25 pm The first few pages like this are actually included in Sadamoto's Der Mond.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Mar 25, 2014 1:36 pm Thank you! The original page never worked for me.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Tue Mar 25, 2014 3:52 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: The first few pages like this are actually included in Sadamoto's Der Mond.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Mar 25, 2014 4:12 pm tzigi wrote: The first few pages (the last one being the one with three images of Sachiel nearing the "camera") are actually a part of the standard edition of the manga (at least its Polish edition).
